generated_code:
# Main entry point demonstrating cross-module class usage
# Imports classes from organisms and creatures modules

from organisms import Organism, Plant, get_organism_summary, classify_organism
from creatures import Animal, Dog, Cat, Bird, create_zoo

def main():
    # Create organisms from the base module
    fern: Plant = Plant("Fiddleleaf", 2, 45)
    
    # Create creatures that extend organisms
    dog: Dog = Dog("Buddy", 4, "Golden Retriever")
    cat: Cat = Cat("Mittens", 2)
    bird: Bird = Bird("Tweety", 1, True)
    
    # Test polymorphism - treat all as Organism
    print("=== Polymorphic Description ===")
    all_organisms: list[Organism] = [fern, dog, cat, bird]
    
    for org in all_organisms:
        print(get_organism_summary(org))
    
    # Test virtual method dispatch across modules
    print("=== Cross-Module Virtual Calls ===")
    for org in all_organisms:
        print(org.speak())
    
    # Test type classification
    print("=== Type Classification ===")
    for org in all_organisms:
        category: str = classify_organism(org)
        print(f"{org.name} is classified as: {category}")
    
    # Test factory function from creatures module
    print("=== Zoo from Factory ===")
    zoo: list[Organism] = create_zoo()
    for animal in zoo:
        print(animal.description())
    
    # Test Cat-specific method
    print("=== Cat Life Tracking ===")
    print(f"{cat.name} starts with {cat.lives_remaining} lives")
    remaining: int = cat.lose_life()
    print(f"After losing one: {remaining} lives")
    
    # Verify cross-module inheritance chain
    print("=== Inheritance Verification ===")
    print(f"Dog is Organism: {isinstance(dog, Organism)}")
    print(f"Cat is Animal: {isinstance(cat, Animal)}")
    print(f"Dog is Plant: {isinstance(dog, Plant)}")

# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
# === Polymorphic Description ===
# [PLANT] Fiddleleaf is a 2 year old plant, 45cm tall
# [ANIMAL] Buddy is a 4 year old Golden Retriever (Canis lupus familiaris)
# [ANIMAL] Mittens is a 2 year old (Felis catus)
# [ANIMAL] Tweety is a 1 year old (Aves)
# === Cross-Module Virtual Calls ===
# Fiddleleaf is 2 years old says: ...
# Buddy says: Woof!
# Mittens says: Meow!
# Tweety says: Tweet!
# === Type Classification ===
# Fiddleleaf is classified as: plant
# Buddy is classified as: animal
# Mittens is classified as: animal
# Tweety is classified as: animal
# === Zoo from Factory ===
# Rex is a 5 year old German Shepherd (Canis lupus familiaris)
# Whiskers is a 2 year old (Felis catus)
# Polly is a 1 year old (Aves)
# === Cat Life Tracking ===
# Mittens starts with 9 lives
# After losing one: 8 lives
# === Inheritance Verification ===
# True
# True
# False

source_files.main.spy:
# Main entry point demonstrating cross-module class usage
# Imports classes from organisms and creatures modules

from organisms import Organism, Plant, get_organism_summary, classify_organism
from creatures import Animal, Dog, Cat, Bird, create_zoo

def main():
    # Create organisms from the base module
    fern: Plant = Plant("Fiddleleaf", 2, 45)
    
    # Create creatures that extend organisms
    dog: Dog = Dog("Buddy", 4, "Golden Retriever")
    cat: Cat = Cat("Mittens", 2)
    bird: Bird = Bird("Tweety", 1, True)
    
    # Test polymorphism - treat all as Organism
    print("=== Polymorphic Description ===")
    all_organisms: list[Organism] = [fern, dog, cat, bird]
    
    for org in all_organisms:
        print(get_organism_summary(org))
    
    # Test virtual method dispatch across modules
    print("=== Cross-Module Virtual Calls ===")
    for org in all_organisms:
        print(org.speak())
    
    # Test type classification
    print("=== Type Classification ===")
    for org in all_organisms:
        category: str = classify_organism(org)
        print(f"{org.name} is classified as: {category}")
    
    # Test factory function from creatures module
    print("=== Zoo from Factory ===")
    zoo: list[Organism] = create_zoo()
    for animal in zoo:
        print(animal.description())
    
    # Test Cat-specific method
    print("=== Cat Life Tracking ===")
    print(f"{cat.name} starts with {cat.lives_remaining} lives")
    remaining: int = cat.lose_life()
    print(f"After losing one: {remaining} lives")
    
    # Verify cross-module inheritance chain
    print("=== Inheritance Verification ===")
    print(f"Dog is Organism: {isinstance(dog, Organism)}")
    print(f"Cat is Animal: {isinstance(cat, Animal)}")
    print(f"Dog is Plant: {isinstance(dog, Plant)}")

# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
# === Polymorphic Description ===
# [PLANT] Fiddleleaf is a 2 year old plant, 45cm tall
# [ANIMAL] Buddy is a 4 year old Golden Retriever (Canis lupus familiaris)
# [ANIMAL] Mittens is a 2 year old (Felis catus)
# [ANIMAL] Tweety is a 1 year old (Aves)
# === Cross-Module Virtual Calls ===
# Fiddleleaf is 2 years old says: ...
# Buddy says: Woof!
# Mittens says: Meow!
# Tweety says: Tweet!
# === Type Classification ===
# Fiddleleaf is classified as: plant
# Buddy is classified as: animal
# Mittens is classified as: animal
# Tweety is classified as: animal
# === Zoo from Factory ===
# Rex is a 5 year old German Shepherd (Canis lupus familiaris)
# Whiskers is a 2 year old (Felis catus)
# Polly is a 1 year old (Aves)
# === Cat Life Tracking ===
# Mittens starts with 9 lives
# After losing one: 8 lives
# === Inheritance Verification ===
# True
# True
# False
